body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/contractArchives/uploadAttachment 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/contractArchives/uploadAttachment 
 ## 接口描述 
用于上传合同附件，请求类型multipart/form-data，文件不能超过50MB 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"PRJCOD","required":true,"label":"%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E6%A0%87%E8%AF%86","exampleValue":"XFT00001","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"EMPNUMBER","required":true,"label":"%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E5%8F%B7%09","exampleValue":"U0000%20","maxLength":"100"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"data","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"seqId","required":false,"label":"%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6ID(%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E7%94%A8%E8%BF%99%E4%B8%AA%E4%BD%9C%E4%B8%BA%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0)","exampleValue":"13909","desc":"%20%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E7%94%A8%E8%BF%99%E4%B8%AA%E4%BD%9C%E4%B8%BA%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"fileNam","required":false,"label":"%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0(%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E7%94%A8%E8%BF%99%E4%B8%AA%E4%BD%9C%E4%B8%BA%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0)","exampleValue":"%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C1","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true-%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%8Cfalse-%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%B6%88%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":""}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 {BaseURL}/v1/contractArchives/uploadAttachment?PRJCOD=XFT00001&EMPNUMBER=U0000  

注意文件上传，参数file

### 返回示例

``` json
{
    "data": {
        "seqId": 13909,
        "fileNam": "d5e3ee5b-07a7-461a-aba0-c63b3070a93e"
    },
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！"
}

```  
## 错误码说明 

| **错误码** | **错误描述** | **备注** |
| ---------- | ------------ | -------- |
| 200        | 成功         | 无      |
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/contractArchives/uploadAttachment

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/contractArchives/uploadAttachment

接口描述

用于上传合同附件，请求类型multipart/form-data，文件不能超过50MB

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"PRJCOD","required":true,"label":"%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E6%A0%87%E8%AF%86","exampleValue":"XFT00001","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"EMPNUMBER","required":true,"label":"%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E5%8F%B7%09","exampleValue":"U0000%20","maxLength":"100"}}]}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"data","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"seqId","required":false,"label":"%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6ID(%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E7%94%A8%E8%BF%99%E4%B8%AA%E4%BD%9C%E4%B8%BA%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0)","exampleValue":"13909","desc":"%20%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E7%94%A8%E8%BF%99%E4%B8%AA%E4%BD%9C%E4%B8%BA%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"fileNam","required":false,"label":"%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0(%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E7%94%A8%E8%BF%99%E4%B8%AA%E4%BD%9C%E4%B8%BA%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0)","exampleValue":"%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C1","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true-%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%8Cfalse-%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%B6%88%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":""}}]}]}

接口调用示例

{BaseURL}/v1/contractArchives/uploadAttachment?PRJCOD=XFT00001&EMPNUMBER=U0000

注意文件上传，参数file

返回示例

{
    "data": {
        "seqId": 13909,
        "fileNam": "d5e3ee5b-07a7-461a-aba0-c63b3070a93e"
    },
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！"
}

错误码说明

错误码 错误描述 备注
200 成功 无
